style_effects: Flickering translucent purple mist particles drift slowly around the body, elongating shadows bending unnaturally at the edges. A pale, ethereal blue aura pulses gently around the form, casting cold, ghostly luminescence that distorts reflections in nearby still water. The energy pulses visible through the skin emit faint, slow-moving violet sparks. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
